summary: Backend-only Task 5 verification completed for RCSEnvironment core loop contract and regressions; all executed tests passed.
action_items: No functional fixes required for Task 5.
Optional hardening: add a test asserting returned TrajectoryRecord objects are independently mutable without affecting internal environment state.
critical_code_review_comments: reset() is mandatory before first step(); step() has no implicit initialization and raises a clear RuntimeError otherwise.
StepResult.observation is captured pre-mutation, so it represents the exact step being evaluated; history includes only already-executed steps and respects history_window.
RuleSet remains the single authority for switch logic via apply()/is_post_switch(); done state and post-done guardrails are correctly enforced.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed pytest /app/tests -v with JUnit output: 31/31 passing. Task 5 environment behaviors (reset contract, pre/post-switch evaluation, reward mapping, done handling, trajectory/history constraints, RuleSet alignment) are covered and green.
rca of the issue: No issue reproduced. RCSEnvironment execution contract matches requested behavior. NO MOCKED APIs used.
